authority: NESO industry update on additional methodologies being developed post-TMO4+
file: 05 - Connections Reform (TMO4+)/Further Connections Methodologies Update - Dec 2025.pdf
summary: NESO's update on the further methodologies that sit alongside G2CM and CNDM to complete the TMO4+ reform package. Covers the Project Designation Methodology (how individual projects are identified as strategically aligned), arrangements for technologies not covered cleanly by G2CM (long-duration storage, hybrids, interconnectors), and the roadmap for future iterations of the methodology set.
scope: Project Designation Methodology — how projects are mapped onto strategic plans
Demand-side designation (feeds into Demand Connections reform)
Governance: how methodologies are reviewed and updated

keyParts.name: Designation process
keyParts.detail: The flow from strategic plan to named project cohorts eligible for Gate 2.

keyParts.name: Hybrid technology rules
keyParts.detail: Solar+BESS, wind+BESS — how the MW and land thresholds combine.

keyParts.name: Roadmap
keyParts.detail: Planned iterations through 2026 and beyond as CP2030, SSEP and CSNP mature.
